Cloud MCP API Skills Hub

All MCP servers and service APIs in one place.

Per-Service REST APIs

REST

C3 API

Unified cloud infrastructure REST API — inventory, operations, observability, security, FinOps.

Swagger ↗
REST

Matomo Analytics

Web analytics — visitor stats, event tracking, goal funnels.

Docs → Dashboard ↗
REST

NocoDB

Open-source Airtable alternative — database views, forms, REST/GraphQL.

Docs → App ↗
REST

Windmill

Workflow automation — scripts, flows, schedules, webhooks.

Docs →
REST

Crawlee

Web scraping cloud — actors, runs, datasets, key-value stores.

Docs → API ↗
REST

Mailu

Self-hosted email — SMTP, IMAP, aliases, domains, admin API.

Docs →
REST

Syncthing

File synchronisation — devices, folders, events, config API.

Docs →
REST

PhotoPrism

Photo library — albums, search, labels, index, faces.

Docs → App ↗
REST

ntfy

Push notifications — publish, subscribe, topics, auth.

Docs →
REST

Authelia

2FA / OIDC gateway — token introspection, user info, session.

Docs →

MCP

MCP

Unix MCP

NixOS + Termux system management. Flakes, home-manager, build system, shell config.

Docs →
MCP

C3 MCP API

Cloud Control Center — 70 tools for infra management: SSH, Docker, health, build pipeline, topology.

Docs → REST Swagger ↗
MCP

C3 Services MCP API

Per-service MCP wrappers — interact with Matomo, NocoDB, Windmill, Crawlee, and more via natural language.

Docs →
MCP

Mattermost MCP

Team messaging — read, post, reply, react, channel management, user search.

Docs →

Skills

Skill

Algorithmic Art

Generative art with p5.js — seeded randomness, particle systems, fractals, Perlin noise.

Skill

Brand Guidelines

Apply official Anthropic brand styling — colors, typography, identity system.

Skill

Canvas Design

Visual art creation (PNG/PDF) — two-step design with 90% visual, 10% text.

Skill

Doc Co-authoring

Three-stage collaborative writing — PRDs, specs, proposals.

Skill

DOCX

Word document manipulation — extraction, creation, tracked changes.

Skill

Frontend Design

Production-grade bold UI — distinctive frontends avoiding "AI aesthetics".

Skill

Internal Comms

Status reports, newsletters, FAQ responses, 3P updates.

Skill

MCP Builder

Create MCP servers — research, implementation, testing, packaging.

Skill

PDF

PDF toolkit — extraction, OCR, creation, merge/split, watermarks, encryption.

Skill

PPTX

PowerPoint presentations — templates, OOXML, thumbnails, slide rearrangement.

Skill

Skill Creator

Build custom skills — SKILL.md frontmatter, bundled resources, packaging.

Skill

Slack GIF Creator

Animated GIFs for Slack — emoji (128x128) and message (480x480) formats.

Skill

Theme Factory

Professional theme styling — 10 curated themes from Ocean Depths to Midnight Galaxy.

Skill

Web Artifacts Builder

React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind + 40+ shadcn/ui components.

Skill

WebApp Testing

Playwright E2E testing — visual regression, accessibility testing.

Skill

XLSX

Excel spreadsheet operations — formulas, data analysis, recalculation.

Agents

Agent

AI Engineer

ML models, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, RAG pipelines.

Agent

Backend Architect

API design, database modeling, microservices, scalability patterns.

Agent

Brand Guardian

Voice, colors & consistency — enforces brand guidelines.

Agent

Content Creator

Blog posts, landing pages, email campaigns, marketing collateral.

Agent

DevOps Automator

CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, infrastructure as code.

Agent

Frontend Developer

React, Vue, Svelte — component architecture, state management.

Agent

Growth Hacker

Viral loops, rapid user acquisition, A/B testing, referral programs.

Agent

Mobile App Builder

Swift, Kotlin, React Native, Flutter — App Store optimization.

Agent

Project Shipper

Release checklists, blocker resolution, launch coordination.

Agent

Rapid Prototyper

Quick MVPs & POCs — fast iteration, minimal viable features.

Agent

Sprint Prioritizer

Roadmap, sprint planning, backlog grooming, priority frameworks.

Agent

UI Designer

Component libraries, design systems, pixel-perfect interfaces.

Agent

UX Researcher

User journey analysis, usability testing, heuristic evaluation.

Agent

Visual Storyteller

Infographics, presentations, visual communication.

Agent

Whimsy Injector

Delight & easter eggs — micro-interactions, surprise moments.
